description:
Ramp's Accounting Agent moves spend from card swipe to ERP sync with minimal human touch.

It auto-codes transactions using your accounting logic, flags the exceptions that need review, and posts routine items automatically to your accounting system. 

For more info, head to Ramp's help center: https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/45051740591251-Ramp-Accounting-Agent-Enablement-Daily-Use-Admin-guide
